titleStmt.title: SII 5.411: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 411. (A.R. No. 122 of 1894). ON THE OUTSIDE OF THE NORTH WALL OF THE SAME PRAKARA.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
tiruvāykkeḻvikkumel śrīkomāṟapaṉmarāṉa tribhu vaṇaccakra vattikaḷ śrīkulacekarade varkku yāṇṭu Eṭṭāvatu vṛūścika nāyaṟṟup patiṉeḻān
tiyatiyum Aparapakṣa ttu navamiyum caṉikkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Uttirattunāḷ kiḻvempanāṭṭut tirunelveliyāṉa kulaicekaraccaturvedi maṅkalattu sa
bhai kku] c camainta paṇṇaiveli ceyvārkaḷom Ivvūr tirumeṟkoyil vāḻavallapāṇṭiyaviṇṇakar Emperumāṉ koyil tiruccuṟṟil nāyaṉār Aṉavarata
tāṉapperumāḷ tirunāmattāl koṭṭaiyūr Āḷavantāṉ teyvaccilaiyāṉbha ṭaṭaṉ vaitta Akaram Aṉavaratatāṉaccaturvedi maṅkalattu bha ṭṭarkaḷukku muṉṉāḷ Ivvakaram vaikka
piṉṉil Ivarkaḷukku nāṅkaḷ dharmmadā ṉaṅkaḷākak kuṭutta nattattukkum tecaṅka(ḷ)ḷukkum pala pra māṇaṅkaḷākaiyāle kalveṭṭa Oṇṇāmaiyil muṉpu kuṭutta samastaprāpti kaḷālum Iṟṟai
nāḷālum dharmmadāna māka Ekapra māṇam paṇṇikkuṭutta paricāvatu Ivvakarattukkup perunāṉkellaiyāvatu kiḻellai kuṉṟattūr melaimaṅkalavitikku meṟ
kum teṉṉellai Ivūṟ teṟku nārācam meṟku(ku) nokkipokiṟa cevvaikku vaṭakkum melellai koṭṭaiyūr Āḷavattāṉ teyavaccilaiyāṉbha ṭṭaṉ tiruntumaṟaippereri Eṉṉum
perāl veṭṭiṉa kuḷattil melkaṭaik kompil vaṭakku nokkippoṉa nirpokikkuk kiḻakkum vaṭavellai muṉpu kāḷikaṇattu veḷḷāḷar kuṭiyirunta Iṭam Akaramākaiyāl piṉpu kāḷikaṇa
ttu veḷḷāḷar kuṭiyiruppāṉa kecavaṉ kaṇapati Uḷḷiṭṭār Eṭutta maṉaikkut teṟku Oḻukkai kiḻakkuniṉṟum meṟkunokkip pokiṟa cevvaikkut teṟkum Āka Innāṉnellaikkuṭpaṭṭa nattamum nattaśeṣa
mum kuḷamum dharmmadā ṉamāka Aṉupavippārākavum Itu niṅkalāka kaṉṟunilai maramum puṟappāṭum cuṭukāṭum paṭutuṟaiyum Eṅkaḷ Ūroṭokka Aṉupavippārākavum Ivarkaḷukku kṣetra māka tirunelveli vaṭakā
ṭṭil nāṅkaḷ dharmmadā ṉam paṇṇikkuṭutta bhūmi kkup perunāṉkellaiyāvatu kiḻellai Īḻaṅkoṇṭāṉil nāyaṉār koyilukkuk kiḻakkuniṉṟum vaṭakkunokkip pālikkoṭṭaikku
p pokiṟa vaḻiccevvaikaḷil nāṅkaḷ nāṭṭuvitta kallukkaḷukku meṟkum teṉṉellai Ivvūrkku vaṭakku kiḻakkuniṉṟum(m) meṟkunokkip poṉa vaḻikkum cuṟukkuḷatti kuḷattikampil
Uṭukkaippuṟamāka vaṭavellaikku nāṭṭiṉa tiruccūlakkallukkum kaṇṭiyatevap pererippaṟṟāl vaṭavellai kiḻakkuniṉṟum meṟkunokkip poy Ikkuḷattil maṟukāltalaiyil Eṟa I
kkoṭṭaiyūr Āḷavantāṉ teyvaccilaiyāṉbha ṭṭaṉ tiruntumāmaṟaippilāṟu Eṉṉum perāl viṭṭa vaḻiyil kiḻmelāka nāṭṭuvitta(k) kallukkaḷukku vaṭakkum melellai Immatu kā
lilniṉṟum vaṭakkunokkip poṉa cevvaiyil nāṭṭuvitta(k) kallukaḷukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭa(ve)vellai muṉṉāḷ Ivarkaḷukku dā ṉapra māṇam paṇṇikkuṭutta tiyākapañcarappereri
ppaṟṟil teṉṉellaikku nāṭṭiṉa kallukkaḷukkut teṟkum Āka Innāṉkellaik kuṭpaṭṭa(p)paṟṟil veṉṟāṉerik karai Oḻukkuṭpaṭa � raioḻu taṉāya
kappereriyeṉṉum perāl Ivvāḷavantāṉ teyvaccilaiyāṉbha ṭṭaṉ Iṭai Ēri kaṭṭi veṭṭuvitta kuḷamum naṉcey puṉcey toṭṭakkūṟu nattam Uṭpaṭṭa kuḷappuravum
Eṅkaḷurppaṟṟil muṉpu puṉakkuḷamāṉa melvempanāṭṭu Āyarkuḷam Uḷḷiṭṭa paṟṟil cātavetaṉ varai Aṉupavittup porukiṟa karai niṅkalāka Eṅkaḷ pūrva caṉappaṭi tevarkku Uḻavoṟṟi vaitta paṟṟāy Ivarpiṉpu melvempanāṭṭuk kolāl nirpā paṇṭitappereri yeṉṉum perāl kuḷamum veṭṭi Eṅkaḷukku svāmibhoga mum tantu porukacceyte Ivar mātta piṉṉum svāmibhoga mum tarāmal perumāḷ kaṇṭuḻavākkip ponta paṟṟil Ibha ṭṭarkaḷukku muṉṉāḷ Eḻāvatu cittiraimātam mutal [10]rmmadā ṉamākak kuṭuttaruḷiṉa tirumukappaṭiyilu
m vaippūruṭaiyāṉ kālukkut teṟku vitikkuk kiḻakku 3 9 6 � vatikku meṟku 3 10 9 � vatikkuk kiḻakkum meṟkum nālāṅkaṇṇāṟṟilum Añcāṅkaṇṇāṟṟilum meṟku virapaṇṭitappererikkuḷamum kiḻakku kāṭuveṭṭiyāṟ kuḷakkaraiyum Ellaiyāka Iṭaiyil Eṟṟaccurukkam Uṭpaṭa Eṭuppuḷḷi nilam � m Āka nilam 1� li nilam Oṉṟaraiveliyiṉāl nila muppatumāvilum Innilattāl vanta(k)kuḷaṅkorvaiyilum Eṅkaḷukkuḷḷa soprāpti kaḷum Āka Ivvaṉaittum Uda kapūrva māka dharmmadā ṉamum paṇṇi pra māṇamum paṇṇikkuṭuttom sabhai kkuccamainta pa
ṇṇaiveli ceyvārkaḷom Aṉavaratatāṉaccaturvedi maṅkalattu bha ṭṭarkkaḷukku Ippaṭi dā ṉapra māṇam paṇṇikkuṭutta nattaṅkaḷum kṣetra ṅkaḷum kārpacāṉam kuṟuvai payiṟceyyun nilam payiṟceytum ceyvittum kāṭuveṭṭik kaṭṭaipaṟittuk kaḷarum cuṭukāṭum meṭum paḷḷamum pāṭupaṟivarampiṭṭu veṭṭit tiruttip patiṉeṭṭaṭikkolāl patiṉāṟukkup patiṉāṟu koṇṭatu Oru māvāka katiril vaḻi kaṇṇāṟu caturam kaṭṭi naṉcey puṉcey toṭṭakkūṟu tiruttip payirceytum ceyvittum nattam ceytu kuṭiyiruntum kuṭiyiruttiyum maṟṟum taṅkaḷukku saukariyamāṉa(y)paṭikaḷile Aṉu
bha vippārākavum Aṉubha vikkumiṭattu Ippaṟṟukkaḷukku nelkaṭamai Antarāyama pañcupili cantuvikkirakappeṟu tiruvācalviṉiyokam tirumukaeḻuttu viṉiyokam kaikkāṇi kārttikaippaccai nittaṟpaccai Āṉaiccālai kutiraipanti koyiṟkaṭṭaṇattevai koṟṟilakkai kaṭaikkūṭṭilakkai caṇṭāḷappeṟu nāṭṭuviṉiyokam Erivari Āḷvari cāṭṭuvari Uḷḷāyam puṟavāyam taṟiyiṟai cekkiṟai taṭṭoli taṭṭārappāṭṭam Erimiṉpāṭṭam cilvari peruvari maṟṟum Eppeṟpaṭṭa Upātikaḷum variyiṟkaḻittu Uṭaiyār tirunelveliuṭaiyanāyaṉārkku Iṟukkum vāṭākkaṭamai Uṭpaṭa prasāda mceytaruḷi
ṉa tirumukappaṭiyāl Uḷḷa Iṟaikaḷum Iṟuttu Ippaṟṟil Uṭaiyār vāḻavallapāṇṭiśva ramuṭaiyanāyaṉārkku paṅku 2 m vāḻavallapāṇṭiya viṇṇakar Em(p)perumāḷukkup paṅku 2 m Ākappaṅku nālum bha ṭṭarkaḷ paṅku Irupattunālil karaiyiṭṭukkoṇṭu nāyaṉmārkkuk kaṭamai piṟittu tāṅkaḷum taṅkaḷ vaṟkattārum cantirātittavaṟ cellak kāṇiyākak kallilum cempilum veṭṭikkoṇṭu Aṉubha vippatāka dharmmadā ṉamum paṇṇi pra māṇamum paṇṇikkuṭuttom sabhai kkuccamainta paṇṇaiveliceyvārkaḷom Aṉavarata- dā ṉaccaturvedi maṅkalattu bha ṭṭarkaḷukku
Ivai perumelūr Aṉavaratatāṉaṉ tiruvirāmicuraṉ Eḻuttu koṭṭaiyūr karumāṇikkāḻvāṉ Aḻakiyamaṇavāḷaperumāḷ Eḻuttu perumelūr periyavaṉ tiruvirāmicuramuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu tirukkuṭamukkil Āvaṟsakāyaṉ Eḻuttu tirunelveliuṭaiyāṉ Iṟaivāṉaraiyūr cātavetaṉ vāḻavallāṉ Eḻuttu perumelūr nārāyaṇaṉ nilakkariyaṉ Eḻuttu koṭṭaiyūr Āḷavantāṉ tirumāliruñcolai nārāyaṇaṉ Eḻuttu tiruttovaṉai pūcināvi ṉ Iḷaiyaāvaṟsakāyaṉ Eḻuttu tirukkuṭamukku cikailātamuṭaiyāṉ paṟpaṉāpaṉ Eḻuttu tirukattaṭiyūr cirāmatevaṉ cirāmatevaṉ Eḻuttu perumpaṟṟapapuliyūr Aḻakaṉ tirucciṟṟam(pala)
palamuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu perumelūr Āvaṟcakāyaṉ tirunelveliuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu puḷḷamaṅkalattu Anantanārāyaṇa(ṇa)ṉ civallavaṉ Eḻuttu perumelūr nārāyaṇaṉ tiruvaraṅkamuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu Ivarkaḷ colla Idā ṉapra- māṇam Eḻutiṉeṉ perumelūr nārāyaṇaṉ tirunelveliuṭaiyāṉ Eḻuttu sabhai kkuc camaittu sabhā [śrīri]kāriyañceykiṟa puḷḷamaṅkalattut tirumāliruḷucolai nārāyaṇaṉ Eḻuttu Ivvaṉaittum tirunelveliyāṉa kulaicekaraccaturvedi maṅkalattu sabh Aiyār kaiyyāl dā ṉa(m)mum paṇṇuvittuk kuṭuttamaikku Ivai koṭṭaiyūr Āḷavantāṉ teyva
tribhu vaṉaccakra vatti koṉeriṉmaiykoṇṭāṉ kiḻvempaṉāṭṭu brahmadeśam Aṉavaratatāṉaccaturvedi maṅkalattu bha ṭṭarkaḷukku melvempaṉāṭṭu tiyākapañcarippereri Uḷḷiṭṭa kuḷaṅkaḷum kuḷappuravum naṉcey puṉcey nattamuḷpaṭṭa samastaprāpti kaḷ Eppeṟpaṭṭavaiyum tāṅkaḷ muṉpu Uṭaiyār tirunelveliyuṭaiyanāyaṉāṟku Iṟukkum pā ṭākkaṭamai Accu naālaraiye Araikkālum Iṟuttu muṉpu tāṅkaḷ Aṉupavittu pontapaṭi Aṉupaviṟppatāka nāmun tantom Ippaṭikku nam Olai cātaṉamāka koṇṭu kalliluñ cempilum veṭṭi tāṅkaḷum taṅkaḷ vaṟkattāruñ cantirātittavaṟ cella kāṇiyāka Aṉupavittuppotuka Ivai neṭṭuruṭaiyāṉ tiruvi
runtāṉ vīrapāṇṭiyak kāliṅkarāya(ṉ) ṉeḻuttu yāṇṭu 5 Etir ḷ 2 100 5 10 2 Ivai neṭṭuruṭaiyāṉ kāliṅkarāya(ṉ) ṉeḻuttu tulyam
Digital edition of SII 5.411 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
